summary: Completed backend testing of Push Notification Triggers. All 24 tests passed (100% success rate). Verified announcement notifications, event notifications, event reminders, and notification preferences endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: Announcement notifications correctly exclude the creator (exclude_user_id parameter)
Emergency announcements add '🚨 URGENT:' prefix to notification title
Scheduled announcements do NOT trigger immediate notifications (correct behavior)
Event reminders check for existing reminders to avoid duplicate sends
send_push_to_all and send_push_to_users properly handle notification_type parameter
APNs service gracefully handles missing credentials (logs error but doesn't crash)
seed_data_creation: Created test announcements and events prefixed with TEST_ during testing

POST_announcements_notification_trigger.details: Creating published announcements triggers background task for push notification. Emergency announcements get URGENT prefix.

POST_events_notification_trigger.details: Creating events triggers background task for push notification with event details (date, location).

POST_events_send_reminders.details: Admin-only endpoint. Returns events_checked, reminders_scheduled, and window. Supports hours_before parameter.

GET_events_upcoming_reminders.details: Admin-only endpoint. Returns list of upcoming events with attending_count and reminder_sent_today status.

notification_preferences.details: GET and PUT /api/notifications/preferences work correctly. Supports all preference types.

authorization.details: Students correctly blocked (403) from creating announcements, events, and triggering reminders. Admins can access all endpoints.

note_on_apns: Actual push notifications won't be delivered in this environment (no APNs credentials configured), but all code paths execute without errors. Background tasks are scheduled correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Push notification triggers verified working. All endpoints return correct responses. APNs service handles missing credentials gracefully. Test data prefixed with TEST_ for easy cleanup.
